SIM_HYPHEN.description: Composite IDs with hyphens (e.g. 103000009-01); 100 synthetic variants per draw date.
SIM_HYPHEN.p219_link: Excluded at load time by draw NOT LIKE '%-%'; did not drive P219 structural-break signals.

DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.description: 8-digit YYYYMMDD IDs (e.g. 20090727). Numbers are NOT 6/49: sum~74-75, max<=24.
DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN.p219_link: Excluded in P219 secondary filter; residual contamination contributed to CUSUM/drift.

SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.description: Serial IDs but max(numbers)<=25. Concentrated 2011-2014. Likely different game mislabeled as BIG_LOTTO.
SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.p219_link: PRIMARY driver of P219 BIG_LOTTO structural-break signals. During their era, numbers 26-49 absent -> CUSUM 11x, drift 4x, gap 4x.

p219_signal_explanation.M1_markov: Consecutive overlap inflated; alien blocks share restricted pool; shuffle destroys -> significant p
p219_signal_explanation.M4_cusum: Draw-sum jumps between ~75 (DATE_FORMAT) / ~100 (SMALL_POOL) and ~148 (real 6/49) -> CUSUM 11x null
p219_signal_explanation.M3_drift: Numbers 26-49 absent during alien eras -> window L1 drift 4x null
p219_signal_explanation.M2_gap: Numbers 26-49 absent during alien eras -> gap dispersion 4x null
p219_signal_explanation.M6_entropy: Restricted pool -> lower entropy, higher compressibility
p219_signal_explanation.conclusion: All P219 BIG_LOTTO corrected-significant signals explained by data contamination. NOT real draw-level bias. Anomaly is NOT predictor.

phase_1_backup.authorization: Type D explicit human gate required

phase_2_quarantine_table.description: Create draws_big_lotto_quarantine table; move contaminated rows.
phase_2_quarantine_table.date_format_sql: LENGTH(draw)=8 AND draw LIKE '20%' AND draw NOT LIKE '%-%'
phase_2_quarantine_table.small_pool_note: SMALL_POOL_ALIEN requires Python-driven inspection (max(numbers)<=25 per row)
phase_2_quarantine_table.authorization: Type D explicit human gate required

phase_3_verification.description: Verify canonical row count and drift guard after quarantine.
phase_3_verification.authorization: Type D explicit human gate required

phase_4_re_audit.description: Re-run P246 on cleaned data to confirm GATE_RED resolved.

what_this_does_not_authorize: No strategy development or promotion on BIG_LOTTO
BIG_LOTTO GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION remains until re-audit passes

required_authorization_for_apply: Explicit Type D human gate required before any DB quarantine is executed.
gate_lifted_condition: After Type D quarantine executed, P246 re-audit passes, canonical rows ~2118, drift guard PASS.
final_decision: BIG_LOTTO draws table is ~90.5% contaminated (20,125 of 22,238 rows non-canonical). Three contamination families identified and quantified. All P219 structural-break signals explained by these families. No exploitable edge. BIG_LOTTO GATE_RED_DATA_CONTAMINATION remains. Quarantine plan produced; DB modification requires Type D authorization.
